use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING ACUTE PAIN DUE TO MINOR STRAINS, SPRAINS, AND CONTUSIONS USING A DICLOFENAC PATCH CONTAINING HEPARIN FOR ONCE DAILY ADMINISTRATION WHERE HEPARIN IS NOT RELEASED
